    S

    setDuration(int) - Method in class cs1c.SongEntry
    mutator method sets the duration of the song or zero if invalid range
    setSortType(int) - Static method in class cs1c.SongEntry
    mutator method specifies the entry to perform comparison
    ShoppingBag - Class in subsetsum
    An object of type ShoppingBag class creates an object of type subset sum to find a best possible grocery shopping list within the given budget.
    ShoppingBag(String) - Constructor for class subsetsum.ShoppingBag
    Parameterized constructor for an object of class ShoppingBag.
    SongEntry - Class in cs1c
    One object of class SongEntry stores a simplified version of the genre data set from the Million Song Dataset.
    SongEntry(String, int, String, String) - Constructor for class cs1c.SongEntry
     
    SORT_BY_ARTIST - Static variable in class cs1c.SongEntry
     
    SORT_BY_DURATION - Static variable in class cs1c.SongEntry
     
    SORT_BY_GENRE - Static variable in class cs1c.SongEntry
     
    SORT_BY_TITLE - Static variable in class cs1c.SongEntry
     
    Subset - Class in subsetsum
    Subset class has an instance variable ArrayList and an int sum Because it also has sum, I can keep track of it as I update subsets and I dont have to call totalduration again!
    subsetsum - package subsetsum
     
    SubsetSum - Class in subsetsum
    algorithims to find best subsets
    SubsetSum() - Constructor for class subsetsum.SubsetSum
